response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform design, with most roles centered on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang — not C++ or cloud compute systems. Their leadership experience is informal and unstructured, with no evidence of mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers or owning ambiguous cloud architecture projects.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience
Active open-source contributor with documented technical leadership in tooling
Demonstrated ability to teach and mentor through workshops and community talks
concerns: Only minimal C++ exposure (LabWindows/CVI role), far below 8-year requirement
No evidence of cloud compute platform design or distributed systems at scale
Lacks formal technical leadership experience in cloud or DevOps teams
